title: Assertion `(n >= (static_cast<ssize_t>(pad_left_) ? -1 : 0)) && (n <= static_cast<ssize_t>(this->size()))' after upgrade
description:
### Describe the bug
Happens when a table is created on v25.8.12.129, then upgrade to the current master. (I had a bug with upgrades, and managed to get it fixed last Friday, apologies) cc @Avogar seems related to the JSON type due to reference of ColumnVariant in the stack trace.
### How to reproduce
The users.xml used: [users.txt](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/24029523/users.txt)
Start the server on v25.8.12.129, then run:
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 String, c1 Map(Bool,Array(JSON)), c2 JSON, c3 JSON) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY tuple() SETTINGS min_bytes_for_wide_part = 1;
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (c3, c0, c2, c1) SELECT '{}', ' ', '{"c1":[{},[],{}]}', map((number % 6) = 9,['{"😆":false}', '{"😆":[{},"water"],"c1":"a"}']) FROM numbers(1) GROUP BY number;
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (c0, c1, c3, c2) SELECT '😀', map(), '{"c1":[]}', '{"😉😉":{}}' FROM numbers(9);
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (c2, c0, c1, c3) SELECT '{}', 'had', map(), '{"c0":{}}' FROM numbers(6);
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (c2, c0, c3, c1) SETTINGS query_plan_merge_filter_into_join_condition = 0 SELECT '{"😉😉":{}}', NULL, '{}', map((number % 6) <> 5,[]) FROM numbers(4);
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (c0, c3, c2, c1) SELECT NULL, '{"😉😉":{}}', '{"😆":[]}', map((number % 4) <> 4,[]) FROM numbers(2) GROUP BY number;
```
Next, restart the server with the current master binary and run:
```sql
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (c1, c0, c2, c3) SELECT map(FALSE,['{"c0":{}}'], (number % 10) = 7,['{}', '{}']), x'ff', '{"c0.c1":[40,["86.99.37.31"]],"c1":["2257-05-24"]}', '{"c0.c1":[]}' FROM numbers(5) GROUP BY number;
```
Maybe I can reduce this further
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:
```
clickhouse: src/Common/PODArray.h:405: const T &DB::PODArray<unsigned long, 4096, Allocator<false, false>, 63, 64>::operator[](ssize_t) const [T = unsigned long, initial_bytes = 4096, TAllocator = Allocator<false, false>, pad_right_ = 63, pad_left_ = 64]: Assertion `(n >= (static_cast<ssize_t>(pad_left_) ? -1 : 0)) && (n <= static_cast<ssize_t>(this->size()))' failed.

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t_seed_91668 (c0 VARCHAR, c1 MAP(BIT, ARRAY(VARCHAR)), c2 VARCHAR, c3 VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO t_seed_91668 (c0, c1, c2, c3) SELECT ' ', map((number % 6) = 0, ['{"😆":false}', '{"😆":[{},"water"],"c1":"a"}']), '{"c1":[{},[],{}]}', '{}' FROM (SELECT 1 AS number);

INSERT INTO t_seed_91668 (c0, c1, c2, c3) SELECT '😀', map(FALSE, ['{"c0":{}}']), '{"😉😉":{}}', '{"c1":[]}' FROM (SELECT number FROM (SELECT 1 AS number UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 UNION ALL SELECT 7 UNION ALL SELECT 8 UNION ALL SELECT 9));
key_bug_features: Table creation and upgrade with JSON type
